text:
{
  "fixed_xml": "<ITEM>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>Schweinsleder</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>12 Gulden</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  noch gantz neu in gebunden, oder gegen einem neuen <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>
    <PLACE>Leipziger Edition</PLACE>
  </BIBL>
  zu vertauschen.
</ITEM>",
  "number_of_corrections": 5,
  "explanation": [
    "1. Fixed malformed XML structure by properly nesting `<BIBL>`, `<TITLE>`, `<FORMAT>`, and `<PRIZE>` tags.",
    "2. Corrected the escaped Unicode characters (`\u221a\u2020`) to plain text (removed as they were not valid XML content).",
    "3. Fixed the missing closing tag for the first `<BIBL>` section.",
    "4. Properly nested the second `<BIBL>` section with its child tags (`<TITLE>` and `<PLACE>`).",
    "5. Ensured all tags are properly closed and formatted for valid XML structure."
  ]
}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<ITEM>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>Schweinsleder</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>12 Gulden</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  noch gantz neu in gebunden, oder gegen einem neuen <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>
    <PLACE>Leipziger Edition</PLACE>
  </BIBL>
  zu vertauschen.
</ITEM>
explanation: 1. Fixed malformed XML structure by properly nesting `<BIBL>`, `<TITLE>`, `<FORMAT>`, and `<PRIZE>` tags.
2. Corrected the escaped Unicode characters (`\u221a\u2020`) to plain text (removed as they were not valid XML content).
3. Fixed the missing closing tag for the first `<BIBL>` section.
4. Properly nested the second `<BIBL>` section with its child tags (`<TITLE>` and `<PLACE>`).
5. Ensured all tags are properly closed and formatted for valid XML structure.
